zh.lifeSummary: 當Jordan de Saukeville於1090年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，他的父親Sir Robert de Sackville45歲，母親Lettice Woodville de Wydeville31歲。他於大約1135年與Ella de Den在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1176年在英國英格蘭素可維提哈姆享年86歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Jordan de Saukeville was born in 1090, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert de Sackville, was 45 and his mother, Lettice Woodville de Wydeville, was 31. He married Ella de Den about 1135, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1176, in Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

Il a épousé Ella de Den environ 1135, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1176, à Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Jordan de Saukeville(이)가 1090년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Sackville(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Lettice Woodville de Wydeville(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1135년 영국에서 Ella de Den(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1176년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 위스이함에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jordan de Saukeville родился в 1090 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Sackville было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lettice Woodville de Wydeville, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Ella de Den около 1135 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1176 г. в местности витихам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет.
